args.Description: "Set default deadlineTime to 23:59 for newCrmTask in EmailView.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Add deadlineTime: '23:59' to newCrmTask in handleAddEmailActionItemAsTask"
args.ReplacementContent:
"    const newCrmTask: Task = {
      id: `task-ai-${Date.now()}`,
      title: actionItem,
      description: `AI suggested task from email (UID: ${emailUid}): "${actionItem}"`,
      status: taskStates[0] || "New",
      priority: "medium",
      startDate: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0],
      deadline: new Date(Date.now() + 86400000 * 3).toISOString().split("T")[0],
      deadlineTime: "23:59",
      owner: "AI Assistant",
      assignedUsers: [assignedUser],
      relatedLeadId: matchedLead ? String(matchedLead.id) : undefined
    };"
